summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AURAVITA premium Shopify theme. All major features working correctly including homepage sections, navigation, product page functionality, cart drawer with shipping progress and upsells, collection page with filters, about page, mobile responsiveness, and newsletter form with toast notifications.

design_issues.issue: Announcement bar is present visually but may have different selectors than expected

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, trust badges, featured products sections
Navigation header with logo, shop dropdown, cart icon fully functional
Product page with gallery, variant selector, subscription toggle, add to cart working
Cart drawer opens, shows products, shipping progress bar, upsells, checkout button
Collection page loads with filters, sorting, product grid navigation
About page loads with proper content sections
Mobile responsive design with working mobile menu
Newsletter form submission with toast notifications
All interactive elements properly clickable and functional
Premium design quality with proper spacing, typography, colors
